strengths: Successfully introduced and positioned the loop around the target appendage
Demonstrated proper pusher advancement technique during knot tightening
Maintained good instrument control throughout the positioning phase
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task by cutting the loop tail inside the trainer
Did not confirm final knot security before task completion
Incomplete execution of the final phase despite good initial setup

drills.name: Complete sequence rehearsal
drills.description: Practice the full task sequence emphasizing the tail-cut finish phase after proper loop tightening and security confirmation.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task by cutting the loop tail.

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: 10 secure placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop, focusing on completing the task inside the trainer.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not confirm final knot security before task completion.

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching to ensure proper positioning throughout.
drills.targets_weakness: Incomplete execution of the final phase despite good initial setup.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing the entire task sequence consistently. Your positioning and pusher technique are solid, but task completion requires following through with the tail cut and final security check.
